## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` when routing, metadata, page composition, or interactive UI changed

## Review Focus

- Preserve GitHub Pages static export compatibility.
- Preserve canonical URLs, sitemap, robots, Open Graph/Twitter metadata, and `/kejian-tong` Person JSON-LD.
- Confirm no generated artifacts are committed.
